subcodes.first_line: O illustrious friends and companions of the All-Merciful! A perfumed breath hath wafted from the gardens of the hearts of the beloved ones in Azerbaijan [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جلیل خلیل اخلاء رحمانی نفحه معطری که از حدائق قلوب احبای آذربایجان منتشر شد
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @love of God
